content:
# Best AI Video Tools for Product Demos in 2026

Great product demos convert visitors to customers. AI makes creating professional demos easier than ever!

Check out our [[link:/category/Video|Video category]] for more tools.

---

## [[link:/tools/51|VEED]]: Screen Recording & Editing

[[link:/tools/51|VEED]] is perfect for creating and editing product demo videos.

### VEED for Product Demos
- **Screen recording**: Capture your product perfectly
- **Auto-captions**: Essential for accessibility
- **Background removal**: Clean up your recordings

**Try VEED Free**: https://veed.io

---

## [[link:/tools/201|Pictory]]: Text-to-Demo Videos

[[link:/tools/201|Pictory]] can turn product documentation into demo videos automatically.

### Pictory for Product Demos
- **Text-to-video**: Turn documentation into videos
- **Auto-highlights**: Find the best parts of your demos
- **AI voiceovers**: Add professional narration automatically

**Try Pictory**: https://pictory.ai

---

| Tool | Best For | Price | Free Trial |

## Our Recommendations

- **Screen demos**: Start with [[link:/tools/51|VEED]]
